description: SCMProviderGeneratorBitbucket defines connection info specific to Bitbucket Cloud (API version 2).

allBranches.description: Scan all branches instead of just the main branch.

appPasswordRef.description: The app password to use for the user.  Required. See: https://support.atlassian.com/bitbucket-cloud/docs/app-passwords/

user.description: Bitbucket user to use when authenticating.  Should have a "member" role to be able to read all repositories and branches.  Required
